items.claim: Franco is a capable grappler who can secure takedowns and grind out a decision.
items.quote: I think he's live to grapple, hit takedowns, and maybe embrace the grind for three rounds to a boring decision

items.claim: Coria has effective striking and is a live threat to win by knockout.
items.quote: I think the hands will be effective here, and nickel's awkward, and I think live to get busted up. So, I think Coria is a good knockout prop bet.

items.claim: Nickel has never been knocked out by a head strike.
items.quote: nickel's never been knocked out with a head shot.

items.claim: Chase Hooper is a grappling specialist with high-level skills on the mat.
items.quote: Chase Hooper is a grappling specialist... His grappling is legitimately good.

items.claim: Chase Hooper lacks athleticism compared to other fighters in the division.
Chase Hooper has a poor chin and cannot absorb significant strikes.
items.quote: Chase Hooper can not take a punch or an elbow or a knee. Chase Hooper is very chinny.

items.claim: Ramirez has had his back taken in both of his UFC fights.
items.quote: Ramirez has had his back taken in both his UFC fights.

items.claim: Tommy McMillan is a wild fighter who can break opponents in a dog fight.
items.quote: in a dog fight against the wild man, Tommy McMillan, I think he could be broken.

items.claim: Jared Cannonier is an aging fighter.
Barbosa has hyper-effective grappling compared to her opponent's minimally effective grappling.
items.quote: This is a bit of a, you know, girl that has minimally effective grappling versus someone who's hyper effective in grappling.

items.claim: Lissana is undersized and fighting in a weight class that is not natural for her.
items.quote: The problem is athleticism and size in a weight class that's not natural to Lissana

items.claim: Delgado possesses a significant height and reach advantage.
items.quote: he's got a huge height and reach advantage
